channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Parent-child BMI link may stem from genetic factors, not environment
item.description: A study suggests the connection between parental and child BMI from infancy to age 8 is largely due to genetic confounding.

item.title: Bacterial 'mix-and-match' code may lead to new cancer drugs
item.description: Researchers at Warwick and Monash universities have solved a long-standing puzzle that could enable the development of novel cancer-fighting drugs.

item.title: How immersive travel can reshape identity and habits [PODCAST]
item.description: Subscribe to The Podcast by KevinMD. Watch on YouTube. Catch up on old episodes! A week off does not fix burnout. The same problems await upon return.

item.title: Experts on Chemsex: Can Integrated Care Make a Difference?
item.description: Experts advocate for integrated sexual health, harm reduction, and mental health services to better support individuals engaging in chemsex.
